name: pyhealth
tagline: Guides building clinical ML pipelines with the PyHealth library (MIMIC/eICU/OMOP datasets, dataset→task→model→trainer→metrics pattern).
verdict: Clean, well-scoped skill: no credential reads, no piped-shell execution of remote code, only standard `uv add pyhealth` installs and a public synthetic-MIMIC bucket URL for demos. Triggers and negative triggers are explicit, common pitfalls are flagged, and heavy reference docs are deferred to keep context small. No hidden instructions, no reviewer manipulat
